assertions.name: move-to-skill-present
assertions.description: Report classifies at least one section as 'move to skill'

assertions.name: mfa-professor-referenced
assertions.description: Report mentions mfa-professor by name as target skill

assertions.name: story-context-moved
assertions.description: Story context read directive classified as move-to-skill, not keep

assertions.name: wfid-guidelines-moved
assertions.description: At least 4 of 6 WFID guidelines classified as move-to-skill

assertions.name: document-authority-kept
assertions.description: Document Authority Notes classified as keep

assertions.name: dont-read-chats-kept
assertions.description: Don't read Chats rule classified as keep

assertions.name: skill-inventory-performed
assertions.description: Agent references skills inventory before classifying
